title: GIS Chat for ESA SNAP: AI-Powered Chat Assistant Module
description: An ESA SNAP Desktop module that provides an AI-powered chat panel for executing remote sensing operations via natural language. Part of the GIS Chat cross-platform suite covering ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, and ESA SNAP.

creators.name: Fehér, Zsolt Zoltán
creators.affiliation: University of Debrecen, Faculty of Agricultural and Food Sciences and Environmental Management
